languages.text: {n}Озадаченные пилотом-штрафником Астра Милитарум на древнем шаттле, ваши люди возвращаются на борт. Однако теперь вам ясно — мир, где сгинул Себериан, неподалеку.{/n}

{n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an ancient shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Озадаченные пилотом-штрафником Астра Милитарум на древнем шаттле, ваши люди возвращаются на борт. Однако теперь вам ясно — мир, где сгинул Себериан, неподалеку.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an ancient shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

{n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an Inquisition shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

{n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an Inquisition shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

{n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an ancient shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

languages.text: {n}インキジションの輸送船にアストラ・ミリタムの懲役軍団員が乗っていたことに困惑したあなたの部隊は旗艦へと帰還する。しかし、一つは明らかになった。シベリアが息を引き取った世界はすぐそこにある。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an Inquisition shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Kadim bir mekikte bir Astra Militarum ceza infaz lejyonerinin bulunması karşısında şaşkına dönen mangan, sancak gemisine dönüyor. Ancak artık bir şey kesin: Seberian'ın son nefesini verdiği dünyaya çok yaklaştın.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an ancient shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Kadim bir mekikte bir Astra Militarum ceza infaz lejyonerinin bulunması karşısında şaşkına dönen mangan, sancak gemisine dönüyor. Ancak artık bir şey kesin: Seberian'ın son nefesini verdiği dünyaya çok yaklaştın.{/n}

languages.text: {n}星界军判罪军团成员竟然出现在一艘古旧的穿梭机上，你的侦察小队深感疑惑，随即折返旗舰。但有一件事已然明朗——塞贝里安咽下最后一息的世界，已近在眼前。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an ancient shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}星界军判罪军团成员竟然出现在一艘古旧的穿梭机上，你的侦察小队深感疑惑，随即折返旗舰。但有一件事已然明朗——塞贝里安咽下最后一息的世界，已近在眼前。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Von der Anwesenheit eines Legionärs des Astra Militarum auf einem uralten Shuttle verblüfft, kehrt dein Trupp auf das Flaggschiff zurück. Eine Sache steht jetzt allerdings fest ... die Welt, auf der Seberian sein Leben aushauchte, ist ganz in der Nähe.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an ancient shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Von der Anwesenheit eines Legionärs des Astra Militarum auf einem uralten Shuttle verblüfft, kehrt dein Trupp auf das Flaggschiff zurück. Eine Sache steht jetzt allerdings fest ... die Welt, auf der Seberian sein Leben aushauchte, ist ganz in der Nähe.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Déconcertée par la présence d'un légionnaire pénal de l'Astra Militarum sur une navette antique, votre escouade retourne au vaisseau amiral. Une chose est sûre : le monde sur lequel Seberian a rendu son dernier souffle est tout proche.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an ancient shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Déconcertée par la présence d'un légionnaire pénal de l'Astra Militarum sur une navette antique, votre escouade retourne au vaisseau amiral. Une chose est sûre : le monde sur lequel Seberian a rendu son dernier souffle est tout proche.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tu escuadrón, perplejo por la presencia de un legionario penal del Astra Militarum en una lanzadera antigua, vuelve a la nave insignia. Solo tienes clara una cosa: el mundo donde Seberian acabó pereciendo está cada vez más cerca.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Baffled by the presence of an Astra Militarum penal legionnaire on an ancient shuttle, your squad returns to the flagship. One thing is now clear, however — the world where Seberian drew his final breath is close at hand.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tu escuadrón, perplejo por la presencia de un legionario penal del Astra Militarum en una lanzadera antigua, vuelve a la nave insignia. Solo tienes clara una cosa: el mundo donde Seberian acabó pereciendo está cada vez más cerca.{/n}
